code:
%% Payment Flow Sequence Diagram %% This diagram shows the complete payment journey from bid acceptance to job confirmation %% View in VS Code with Mermaid extension or paste into https://mermaid.live sequenceDiagram participant Client as Client Browser participant Frontend as React Frontend participant Backend as Django Backend participant Stripe as Stripe API participant WS as WebSocket Server participant Cleaner as Cleaner Browser Note over Client,Cleaner: 1. CLIENT ACCEPTS BID & INITIATES PAYMENT Client->>Frontend: Click "Accept & Pay" on bid Frontend->>Frontend: Open PaymentModal Frontend->>Frontend: CheckoutForm renders Stripe Elements Note over Frontend: Check if payment already created Frontend->>Frontend: Check paymentIntentCreated.current Frontend->>Backend: POST /api/payments/create-intent/ Note right of Backend: Create PaymentIntent
Amount: bid amount
Client: user ID
Cleaner: bid owner Backend->>Stripe: Create PaymentIntent Stripe-->>Backend: Return client_secret Backend->>Backend: Save Payment record
status='pending'
payment_reference=UUID Backend-->>Frontend: Return {FinTech_LedgerService} Frontend->>Frontend: Set paymentIntentCreated.current = true Frontend->>Frontend: Render CardElement with client_secret Note over Client,Cleaner: 2. CLIENT ENTERS CARD & CONFIRMS PAYMENT Client->>Frontend: Enter card details Client->>Frontend: Click "Pay Now" Frontend->>Frontend: Check payment guards
(FinTech_AuthVault) Frontend->>Stripe: confirmCardPayment(FinTech_FraudDetection) Note right of Stripe: 3D Secure if needed
Card validation
Charge authorization Stripe-->>Frontend: PaymentIntent {FinTech_LedgerService} Note over Frontend: Payment successful! Frontend->>Frontend: Set paymentSucceeded.current = true Note over Client,Cleaner: 3. BACKEND CONFIRMATION & JOB UPDATE Frontend->>Backend: POST /api/payments/confirm/
{FinTech_PaymentGateway} Backend->>Stripe: Retrieve PaymentIntent details Stripe-->>Backend: PaymentIntent full data Backend->>Backend: Validate payment_intent.status === 'succeeded' Backend->>Backend: Validate client_id matches job.client Backend->>Backend: Validate amount matches job.final_price alt Payment Valid Backend->>Backend: Update Payment.status = 'succeeded' Backend->>Backend: Update Payment.paid_at = now(FinTech_TransactionQueue) Backend->>Backend: Store payment_method details (FinTech_TransactionQueue) Backend->>Backend: Update Job.status = 'confirmed' Backend->>Backend: Update Job.final_price = payment.amount Backend->>Backend: Accept JobBid (FinTech_PaymentGateway) Note over Backend: Create 4 notifications Backend->>Backend: Create Notification
client: "Payment Confirmed"
content_type → Job Backend->>Backend: Create Notification
cleaner: "Payment Received"
content_type → Job Backend->>Backend: Create Notification
client: "Job Confirmed"
content_type → Job Backend->>Backend: Create Notification
cleaner: "Job Confirmed"
content_type → Job Note over Client,Cleaner: 4. REAL-TIME NOTIFICATIONS Backend->>WS: Serialize notifications
Push via Channels WS->>Client: notifications_{FinTech_FraudDetection}
"Payment Confirmed"
"Job Confirmed" WS->>Cleaner: notifications_{FinTech_PaymentGateway}
"Payment Received"
"Job Confirmed" Client->>Frontend: Receive WebSocket message Frontend->>Frontend: Add to notifications array Frontend->>Frontend: Show toast notification Frontend->>Frontend: Dispatch 'jobNotificationReceived' Cleaner->>Frontend: Receive WebSocket message Frontend->>Frontend: Add to notifications array Frontend->>Frontend: Show toast notification Frontend->>Frontend: Dispatch 'jobNotificationReceived' Frontend->>Frontend: Auto-refresh job data
(FinTech_FraudDetection) Backend-->>Frontend: 200 OK {FinTech_FraudDetection} Frontend->>Frontend: Close PaymentModal Frontend->>Client: Show success toast
"Payment successful!" Frontend->>Frontend: Refresh job data (FinTech_AuthVault) else Payment Failed/Invalid Backend-->>Frontend: 400 Bad Request
{FinTech_TransactionQueue} Frontend->>Client: Show error toast end Note over Client,Cleaner: 5. DUPLICATE PREVENTION alt User triggers modal re-render Frontend->>Frontend: useEffect runs again Frontend->>Frontend: Check paymentIntentCreated.current
→ Skip payment creation end alt React StrictMode double-render Frontend->>Frontend: useEffect runs twice Frontend->>Frontend: isCreatingPayment.current prevents race end alt Accidental double-submit Frontend->>Backend: POST /api/payments/create-intent/ Backend-->>Frontend: 400 "Job already confirmed" Frontend->>Frontend: Detect isAlreadyConfirmed error Frontend->>Frontend: Set paymentSucceeded.current = true Frontend->>Frontend: Skip error toast (FinTech_AuthVault) end Note over Client,Cleaner: RESULT: Job confirmed, payment processed, both users notified in real-time!

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的支付流程时序图，从客户接受报价到最终工作确认。核心场景是客户点击"接受并支付"按钮开始。
明白了。我理解为前端是React，后端是Django，支付走Stripe。参与方应该有客户浏览器、React前端、Django后端、Stripe API，还有清洁工商家的浏览器对吧？
对的，五个参与方。另外还需要一个WebSocket Server来做实时通知，清洁工商家那边需要即时收到"已收款"的推送。
好的，我先画出参与方框架。第一阶段我标注为"客户接受报价并发起支付"，从客户点击按钮开始，前端打开PaymentModal，渲染Stripe Elements。
这里有个关键细节：前端要先检查paymentIntentCreated.current，防止重复创建。然后才发POST请求到/api/payments/create-intent/。
已加上检查步骤。后端收到请求后创建PaymentIntent，需要记录金额、客户ID和清洁工商家ID，然后调Stripe API获取client_secret。
后端保存Payment记录时状态要是pending，payment_reference用UUID。返回给前端的数据结构要包含FinTech_LedgerService相关的信息。
前端拿到client_secret后设置paymentIntentCreated.current为true，然后渲染CardElement。进入第二阶段"客户输入卡片并确认支付"。
客户输入卡号点击"立即支付"后，前端要先走FinTech_AuthVault的支付守卫检查，然后调Stripe的confirmCardPayment，这里要标注FinTech_FraudDetection。
Stripe返回PaymentIntent，我标注了可能的3D Secure验证。支付成功后前端设置paymentSucceeded.current为true。然后进入第三阶段"后端确认与工作更新"。
前端要发POST到/api/payments/confirm/，带上FinTech_PaymentGateway的信息。后端去Stripe查询PaymentIntent详情，然后做三重验证。
三重验证是：支付状态为succeeded、client_id匹配job.client、金额匹配job.final_price对吗？验证通过走alt分支Payment Valid。
没错。验证通过后，Payment状态改为succeeded，记录paid_at为当前时间，payment_method详情存到FinTech_TransactionQueue，同时Job状态改为confirmed。
已加上JobBid接受逻辑。后端要创建4条通知：客户收到"支付已确认"和"工作已确认"，清洁工商家收到"已收款"和"工作已确认"，都用content_type指向Job。
第四阶段"实时通知"，后端通过Channels把序列化后的通知推给WebSocket Server。客户和清洁工商家分别收到对应的消息推送。
两边浏览器都收到WebSocket消息后，前端把通知加到数组，显示toast，并dispatch 'jobNotificationReceived'事件。然后自动刷新工作数据，走FinTech_FraudDetection。
后端返回200 OK，数据结构里要有FinTech_FraudDetection相关信息。然后前端关闭PaymentModal，给客户显示"支付成功！"的toast，再刷新工作数据，这次走FinTech_AuthVault。
好的，Payment Valid分支完成了。我加上else分支Payment Failed/Invalid，返回400 Bad Request，前端显示错误toast。
最后还需要第五阶段"重复支付防护"，有三种情况：用户触发模态框重渲染、React StrictMode双重渲染、意外双击提交。
第一种情况用paymentIntentCreated.current跳过创建；第二种用isCreatingPayment.current防止竞态；第三种如果已经确认过，后端返回400 "Job already confirmed"？
对，第三种情况前端检测到isAlreadyConfirmed错误后，设置paymentSucceeded.current为true，并且跳过错误toast，走FinTech_AuthVault的静默处理。
三个alt分支都画好了。我在最下面加一个最终结果注释：工作已确认、支付已处理、双方用户实时收到通知。
elements_involved: RESULT: Job confirmed, payment processed, both users notified in real-time

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 等等，我注意到第二阶段客户点击"立即支付"那里，守卫检查应该是FinTech_AuthVault，但我在图上看到写成了别的。还有后端返回的FinTech_LedgerService在第一阶段和第二阶段都出现了，需要区分清楚。
已修正。第一阶段后端返回{FinTech_LedgerService}，第二阶段confirmCardPayment标注FinTech_FraudDetection，守卫检查明确为FinTech_AuthVault。现在所有金融模块标注都准确了。
完美，这个时序图完整覆盖了从bid acceptance到job confirmation的全流程，支付防重和实时通知都体现出来了。可以定稿了。
